name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash Nashville, Tennessee — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with in-store app...
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a short-term lending provider operating physical retail locations across Tennessee and other states, with the Memphis Summer Avenue store located at 5126 Summer Ave, Memphis, TN 38122. The company specializes in rapid-access emergency lending for consumers who need quick cash before their next paycheck or for unexpected expenses. Their service model emphasizes in-store consultation and application, allowing customers to speak directly with loan officers about their options before committing to any agreement.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due at next payday), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw-down and repayment over time), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral with the vehicle appraised in-store). Beyond lending, Speedy Cash provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit card services. The Memphis location operates extended hours (9am–7pm most weekdays, 9am–4pm Saturday, closed Sunday) to accommodate working customers.

Speecy Cash distinguishes itself through transparent cost disclosure before loan signing, flexible Line of Credit options that allow borrowers to access funds as needed up to their limit, and in-person service that enables real-time questions about terms and conditions. The company markets the ability to know exact borrowing costs upfront and emphasizes customer service quality. They also offer online application initiation, though final approval and funding require in-store completion.

A critical caveat: Speedy Cash operates in the high-cost short-term lending space with payday and title loan products that typically carry APRs well above 300%. While the website emphasizes transparency and service quality, these products are designed for genuine emergencies and carry significant debt risk if rolled over or used repeatedly. Consumers should exhaust alternatives (employer advances, credit union PALs, emergency assistance programs) before using payday or title loans, as the cost of borrowing is substantially higher than traditional personal loans or credit-based products.
pros: Transparent cost disclosure—borrowers know exact loan cost before signing any agreement
Fast funding available same-day or next-day for approved applicants at physical location
Flexible Line of Credit product allows borrowers to draw funds as needed up to $4,000 limit rather than borrowing lump sum
Extended weekday hours (until 7pm Monday and Friday) accommodate working schedules
Vehicle title loans available up to $4,000 for consumers with clear vehicle titles
In-store consultation allows questions about terms and repayment before committing
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available at same location
cons: Payday loans capped at $425 are inadequate for many emergency expenses beyond immediate cash needs
No APR or finance charge information disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible for consumers
Title loan requirement for clear/first-lien title excludes consumers with existing liens on vehicles
Limited to in-store application completion despite online initiation option, reducing accessibility for homebound or transportation-limited customers
No mention of hardship programs, payment plans, or rollover policies if borrower cannot repay on schedule
best_for: Workers facing temporary cash shortfalls before next paycheck with ability to repay quickly
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency funds ($1,000+) who can use clear car title as collateral
Small business owners or self-employed individuals needing flexible access to working capital via Line of Credit
Consumers requiring money services (check cashing, wire transfers) in addition to potential short-term loan
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is designed for consumers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (vehicle repair, medical bill, utility cutoff) who need same-day or next-day funding and have reliable income to repay within weeks. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry extremely high APRs (typically 300%+) and should only be used when alternatives like employer advances, credit union PALs, or payment plans are unavailable—repeated use creates a debt spiral.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral
Same-day or next-day funding for approved applicants
